query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Flowing translucent petals in orange, teal, and white radiate outward from a dark center against a black background, resembling a blooming flower captured with sweeping motion.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Flowing translucent petals in orange, teal, and white radiate outward with deliberate motion blur that streaks and softens every edge into trailing ribbons of color, dissolving fine detail so that no single petal resolves into clear form, creating an abstract composition where the flower becomes pure gesture and chromatic movement against black emptiness.
